subcodes.first_line: All peoples have awaited and continue to await the days of the Manifestation, yearning with the utmost lowliness and supplication for the meeting with the Promised One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمیع امم منتظر ایام ظهور بوده و هستند و بکمال عجز و ابتهال لقای موعود را آمل
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @suffering and imprisonment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness
